'''鈭歽-ng-d''' ('''kayangad''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chameleonize|chameleonize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-ng-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chameleonize|chameleonize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-ng-d
|-
! Lemma
| kayangad
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyangad|thiyangad]] || [[word:jiyangad|jiyangad]] || [[word:shiyangad|shiyangad]] || [[word:kiyangad|kiyangad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuyangad|thuthuyangad]] || [[word:jujuyangad|jujuyangad]] || [[word:shushuyangad|shushuyangad]] || [[word:kukuyangad|kukuyangad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuyangad|thuyangad]] || [[word:juyangad|juyangad]] || [[word:shuyangad|shuyangad]] || [[word:kuyangad|kuyangad]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuyangad|thuyangad]] || [[word:juyangad|juyangad]] || [[word:shuyangad|shuyangad]] || [[word:kuyangad|kuyangad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theyangad|theyangad]] || [[word:jeyangad|jeyangad]] || [[word:sheyangad|sheyangad]] || [[word:keyangad|keyangad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoyangad|thothoyangad]] || [[word:jojoyangad|jojoyangad]] || [[word:shoshoyangad|shoshoyangad]] || [[word:kokoyangad|kokoyangad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoyangad|thoyangad]] || [[word:joyangad|joyangad]] || [[word:shoyangad|shoyangad]] || [[word:koyangad|koyangad]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyangad|thoyangad]] || [[word:joyangad|joyangad]] || [[word:shoyangad|shoyangad]] || [[word:koyangad|koyangad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙yangad|th忙yangad]] || [[word:j忙yangad|j忙yangad]] || [[word:sh忙yangad|sh忙yangad]] || [[word:k忙yangad|k忙yangad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayangad|thathayangad]] || [[word:jajayangad|jajayangad]] || [[word:shashayangad|shashayangad]] || [[word:kakayangad|kakayangad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayangad|thayangad]] || [[word:jayangad|jayangad]] || [[word:shayangad|shayangad]] || [[word:kayangad|kayangad]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayangad|thayangad]] || [[word:jayangad|jayangad]] || [[word:shayangad|shayangad]] || [[word:kayangad|kayangad]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shayangad|shayangad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshayangad|goshayangad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishayangad|gokishayangad]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shayangadn眉|shayangadn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshayangadnkn眉|goshayangadnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishayangadn眉|gokishayangadn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shayangadsh毛|shayangadsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshayangadnksh毛|goshayangadnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishayangadsh毛|gokishayangadsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayangadro|shayangadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayangadnkro|goshayangadnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayangadro|gokishayangadro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shayangadmu|shayangadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayangadnkmu|goshayangadnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayangadmu|gokishayangadmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shayangadsher|shayangadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshayangadnksher|goshayangadnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishayangadsher|gokishayangadsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shayangadng|shayangadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshayangadnkng|goshayangadnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishayangadng|gokishayangadng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shayangadya|shayangadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshayangadnkya|goshayangadnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishayangadya|gokishayangadya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shayangadyam|shayangadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshayangadnkyam|goshayangadnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishayangadyam|gokishayangadyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayangadn眉sh毛|shayangadn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayangadnkn眉sh毛|goshayangadnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayangadn眉sh毛|gokishayangadn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayangadn眉ro|shayangadn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayangadnkn眉ro|goshayangadnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayangadn眉ro|gokishayangadn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayangadn眉mu|shayangadn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayangadnkn眉mu|goshayangadnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayangadn眉mu|gokishayangadn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayangadsh毛n眉|shayangadsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayangadnksh毛n眉|goshayangadnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayangadsh毛n眉|gokishayangadsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayangadsh毛ro|shayangadsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayangadnksh毛ro|goshayangadnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayangadsh毛ro|gokishayangadsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayangadsh毛mu|shayangadsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayangadnksh毛mu|goshayangadnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayangadsh毛mu|gokishayangadsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayangadron眉|shayangadron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayangadnkron眉|goshayangadnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayangadron眉|gokishayangadron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayangadrosh毛|shayangadrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayangadnkrosh毛|goshayangadnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayangadrosh毛|gokishayangadrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shayangadromu|shayangadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshayangadnkromu|goshayangadnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishayangadromu|gokishayangadromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shayangadmun眉|shayangadmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshayangadnkmun眉|goshayangadnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishayangadmun眉|gokishayangadmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shayangadmush毛|shayangadmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshayangadnkmush毛|goshayangadnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishayangadmush毛|gokishayangadmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shayangadmuro|shayangadmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshayangadnkmuro|goshayangadnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishayangadmuro|gokishayangadmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
